raw_consumer_statement: I reported charges made on my citibank card as fraudulent. There were purchases made as well as balance transfers that I did not make or authorize. Citibank would not remove the charges. I refused to make payments on these charges and eventually closed my accounts. After 6 months I finally managed to get ciitibank to write off the charges. Unfortunately the reported and contine to report 6 missed payments to the credit reporting companies. I've spent countless hours on the phone with citibank and I can not get them to remove this from reports. This has lowered my credit score from good to in the low fair range.
